summary: Iteration 87: SHA-256 Tamper Detection for Legal Archive - All features tested and working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 87 tested SHA-256 tamper detection for Legal Archive. All integrity endpoints working: /integrity/backfill, /integrity/verify-all, search returns integrity_status + integrity_hash. Tamper detection verified by manually corrupting a consent record and confirming detection. Agreement templates have verbatim DOCX content with version>=2. PA Create Form refactor working with all data-testids preserved. Legal Archive UI shows Verify button, integrity banner, and hash badges per row.

backend_integrity_endpoints.POST /api/legal-archive/integrity/backfi: PASS - Admin can backfill, returns counts {consent, signature, invoice, total}
backend_integrity_endpoints.GET /api/legal-archive/integrity/verify-: PASS - Returns {verified, tampered, unverified, total, tampered_records[], scanned_at}
backend_integrity_endpoints.Tamper detection sanity: PASS - Manually corrupted consent record detected as tampered, then restored and rehashed
backend_integrity_endpoints.GET /api/legal-archive/search: PASS - Returns integrity_status (verified|tampered|unverified) and integrity_hash (12-char prefix)
backend_integrity_endpoints.Authorization 403 for non-admin: PASS - Partner and Client get 403 on /integrity/* endpoints

agreement_templates.3 templates exist with version>=2: PASS - Australia Standard, Australia Protection, Canada Express Entry

frontend_legal_archive.Hash badges per row (data-testid=integri: PASS - 7 badges with green ShieldCheck icons

frontend_agreement_typography..agreement-doc class with serif font: PASS - Georgia, Times New Roman, Cambria, serif
